text: Atlas of Minimally Invasive Thoracic Surgery presents step-by-step instructions on procedures that yield better patient outcomes and recoveries.

Watch experts in the field perform video-assisted thoracoscopic surgery including lung volume reduction surgery through large detailed photographs as well as videos on DVD and online at expertconsult.com.
Hone your skills in each procedure through step-by-step instructions along with tips and discussions of complications.
Grasp the visual nuances of surgery from nearly 400 interoperative photographs.
Master the full range of minimally invasive procedures.
Watch procedures performed by the experts who helped pioneer them
